$comment: Claude Code harness settings for the SDLC framework. Framework CONFIG (models, gates, paths) lives in sdlc-config.json — this file is only for harness behavior like hooks. Shipped/committed so every project gets ground-truth injection. verify-gate.sh runs on Stop and on writes to a phase manifest.json: it re-verifies the execution-guarantee contract (roster.json completeness + report integrity + no dangling failures + gate.passed honesty) in CODE, not prose — this is what makes the phase gate UN-BYPASSABLE by an agent that merely claims it passed. Its non-zero exit blocks the turn from ending / the manifest write from being trusted. The Stop hook takes no phase arg, so verify-gate.sh auto-detects the latest agent_state/phases/<N> dir.

hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */agent_state/phases/*/manifest.json) p=$(printf '%s' "$f" | sed -E 's#.*/agent_state/phases/([0-9]+)/manifest.json#\1#'); .claude/hooks/verify-gate.sh "$p" ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac
